title: juncus palustris
intro: Juncus palustris, also known as marsh rush or soft rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, and is commonly found in wetlands and marshy areas. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Juncus palustris include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce fever, and support digestive health.
